error.authorization_required: Authorization is required before the panel can be used. Check the access code and passphrase, then try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the panel. Confirm the host is reachable and the panel is online.
error.invalid_credentials: The access code or passphrase is invalid.
error.invalid_link_keys: Stored link keys are invalid. Relink the panel with the access code and passphrase.
error.missing_context: Panel details are missing. Run discovery again or enter the host manually.
error.not_ready: Connected, but the panel did not finish initializing. Wait a moment and try again.

user.title: Set up Elke27
user.description: Choose a discovered panel or select manual entry to continue.

data_description.device: Select a discovered panel or manual entry.

manual.title: Manual connection
manual.description: Enter the host, access code, and passphrase.

data_description.host: The panel host name or IP address.
data_description.access_code: The panel access code used during linking.

credentials.title: Link credentials
credentials.description: Enter the access code and passphrase to link the panel.

data_description.access_code: The panel access code used during linking.

relink.title: Relink panel
relink.description: Enter the access code and passphrase to relink the panel.

data_description.access_code: The panel access code used during linking.
